title: Role-Based Access Control: How to Build an RBAC App with AI
summary: AI Master demonstrates building an event management system using Softr's AI Co-Builder, featuring role-based access control, permissions, workflows, and automations without multiple AI prompts. The video compares Softr against alternatives like Lovable and Replit for no-code app development.
